items.title: Mexico boss reveals exact plan to deal with Harry Kane and clever mobile phone trick to get squad behind World Cup bid
items.summary: MEXICO boss Javier Aguirre has revealed his exact plan to stop Harry Kane from saving England as he did against DR Congo.
